upgrades.name: Reinforced Palisade
upgrades.description: Heavy timbers and iron ties around the perimeter. Raids hit the gate, not the wall.

upgrades.name: Winter Larder
upgrades.description: Salted meat, pickled roots, and a locked door. Frost seasons sting less.

upgrades.name: Garrison Smithy
upgrades.description: A working forge for arms and armour. Mercs leave better kitted than they arrive.

upgrades.name: Wayside Chapel
upgrades.description: A small stone chapel for the dead. The living sleep a little easier.

upgrades.name: Stone Watch Tower
upgrades.description: A four-storey tower with crow's-nest sightlines. Few surprises reach the gate.

upgrades.name: Granary
upgrades.description: A stone granary and root cellar. The fort can feed itself; mercs ask 1g less per payday.
